mentions.note: Health beverage leader with 560% rally since 2022 lows; dominant coconut water position (42% US, 80% UK share); 13% sales CAGR, 28% EBITDA CAGR since IPO. Trading 32x current earnings but justified by 30% growth; recent 20% pullback attractive.
